name: Suspicious File Uploads Detected
description: A large file upload has been detected, which could indicate data exfiltration. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy and potential impact.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the file upload event.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account associated with the file upload.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the upload originated.

parameters.name: destination_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address to which the file was uploaded.

parameters.name: bytes_uploaded
parameters.description: The size of the uploaded file in bytes.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the file that was uploaded (if available).

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL to which the file was uploaded.
